description: Enable users authentication (basic or cookie) or apply IP whitelist rules which require no authentication

filter.description:
Deprecated. Use special user `$allow`.

Database filter for `$allow` (IP-allow listed) trusted user

users.description:
User list.

Special users are:
  - `$allow` user of allow rule as local trusted user without authentication
  - `$anonymous` user of deny role as unknown public user

Define `$anonymous` user to allow unauthenticated and anonymous public access

anyOf.description: User object with dedicated username, password and optional filter and role properties

password.description:
Passwords can be in plain text, {SHA} or {SHA256-salted}.

Hashed password can be generated via
  node -e "pw=process.argv[1];const {createHash,randomBytes}=require('crypto');salt=randomBytes(12);hash=createHash('sha256').update(salt.toString()+pw).digest('base64');console.log('{SHA256-salted}'+salt.toString('base64')+'.'+hash)" 'password'
  {SHA256-salted}FkcbhhcHYW0DdE9u.P9Ik9MG8ldtO0fzGB+RV186vi8PZMomsya5OWC0AEiA=
  node -e "pw=process.argv[1]||'';sha1=require('crypto').createHash('sha1').update(pw).digest('base64');console.log('{SHA}'+sha1)" password
  {SHA}W6ph5Mm5Pz8GgiULbPgzG37mj9g=

filter.description: Database filter for the user. The user filter is applied with AND to the users's role filter

roles.description: List of role names assigned to this user
Role definitions. Each role can have an optional database filter and webapp config

name.description: Role identifier name. This is used for user role assignment and nested role definitions

filter.description: Role database filter. Role filters are applied with OR for multiple roles and applied with AND to the user filter

disabled.description: Flags for this role. See webapp.disabled section for possible values. Disabled features are merged and added for multiple roles

pages.description: Page settings for this role. See webapp.pages section for possible values. Arrays like disabled or flags are merged and added for multiple roles

format.description: Format settings for this role. See webapp.format section for possible values. Arrays like disabled or flags are merged and added for multiple roles

roles.description: List of nested role names assigned to this role

rules.description:
Rules when the request needs authentication
First matching rule wins.

For public gallery use
rules:
  - allow: localhost
  - deny: all

Use special user `$allow` for trusted hosts without authentication and `$anonymous` for unknown public users with deny rules

allow.description: Allow rules without authentication like trusted localhost

deny.description: Deny rules which hosts requires authentication like all
